title: Local-first indexing
summary: Scan a local folder, keep extracted records in SQLite, and avoid account or upload requirements.

title: Dynamic graph
summary: Explore a moving document graph with pan, focus, cluster labels, and nearest-neighbor links.

title: Explainable neighbors
summary: Use TF-IDF terms and chunk evidence to inspect why two documents are close.

title: Manual labels
summary: Rename generated clusters locally without losing the transparent evidence behind them.

title: Optional embeddings
summary: Add dense local vectors only when you explicitly provide or allow a model.

title: Export and backup
summary: Validate projects, save map runs, and export local project bundles deliberately.
